issue.title: Render 'Related:' soft references as dashed edges to distinguish from hard dependencies in the dep graph

successCriteria.description: parseDependencies returns { number, kind: 'hard' | 'soft' }[] — hard for depends-on/blocked-by/requires/after, soft for related-to/see-also and ## Related sections
If the same target appears as both hard and soft, hard wins (more restrictive semantic)
Hard edges render solid; soft edges render dashed (strokeDasharray)
Critical Path and hover-lineage style overlays preserve strokeDasharray on soft edges (currently they replace style entirely, dropping dasharray)
Legend shows solid + dashed indicators with appropriate labels
Edge animation from #151 still works on hard edges; soft animated edges have the moving dash if flowing

phases.title: Add edge-kind distinction end-to-end (parser → edge style → legend)
verification: Read post-edit parseDependencies.ts: confirm return type is { number, kind }[], hard-takes-precedence logic in record() helper
REPL test in node: parse 'depends on #42 and related to #42' against {42} → returns [{ number: 42, kind: 'hard' }] (hard wins)
REPL test: parse '## Related\n- #42' against {42} → returns [{ number: 42, kind: 'soft' }]
Read post-edit useDependencyGraph.ts: edges with dep.kind === 'soft' have style.strokeDasharray = '6 4'
Read post-edit DependencyGraph.tsx: both styledEdges blocks spread ...edge.style; legend has solid + dashed swatches
Read post-edit DependencyGraph.css: legend edge swatch styling present
Run cargo check — must be clean (no Rust changes)
Open Dependency Graph in desktop app: v0.5.1 issues (#147-#150) have ## Related sections referencing each other → edges should render dashed
Open older releases where issues use 'depends on #N' inline → edges render solid
Toggle Critical Path mode on a release with mixed edge kinds → critical edges render amber, but dashed stays dashed (no regression on style spread)
Hover a node with dashed lineage → dimming applies, dashes persist
Confirm legend shows both solid and dashed swatches with labels
